description: Non-human public omics dataset used for research-only DEA is generally low risk.
reason: The dataset appears to be non-human and used for research-only differential expression analysis.
required_actions: Review database access terms.
Cite original dataset and publication.
Do not make clinical or commercial claims without further review.

description: Human omics data used for commercial biomarker discovery requires consent and data-use review.
reason: Human omics data used for commercial purposes may require review of consent, data-use limitations, privacy status, and original database terms.
required_actions: Confirm original consent and data-use limitations.
Check whether individual-level raw data is used.
Confirm whether sample origin involves China or other restricted jurisdictions.
Avoid re-identification attempts.
Document the commercial-use basis.

description: Human omics data used for clinical screening or diagnostic development requires heightened regulatory review.
reason: Clinical screening or diagnostic use may trigger clinical validation, laboratory, medical device, privacy, and consent requirements.
required_actions: Determine whether output will be used for diagnosis, screening, or treatment decisions.
Review clinical validation requirements.
Review laboratory qualification requirements.
Review privacy and consent basis.
Separate research-only analysis from clinical claims.

description: Human genetic or omics data involving Chinese human samples and cross-border or external use may require China HGR review.
reason: If human genetic resource information involves Chinese human samples and is provided abroad or opened externally, China HGR-related review may be relevant.
required_actions: Confirm whether samples are from Chinese individuals.
Confirm whether data qualifies as human genetic resource information.
Confirm whether data is being provided abroad or opened externally.
Review applicable filing, prior report, approval, or ethics requirements.

description: Human data used cross-border with an UNSPECIFIED sample origin — treated as potential China HGR until origin is confirmed. Companion to CN-HGR-001, which covers the literal China/Chinese/unknown values; this covers a truly-absent origin (the normalizer emits an empty string, not the literal 'unknown').
reason: Sample origin is not specified for human data processed or shared cross-border; until origin is confirmed non-Chinese, China HGR-related review may be relevant.
required_actions: Confirm the sample origin — specifically whether samples are from Chinese individuals.
Confirm whether data qualifies as human genetic resource information.
Confirm whether data is being provided abroad or opened externally.
Review applicable filing, prior report, approval, or ethics requirements.

description: Insufficient information prevents a reliable clearance decision.
reason: Key information is missing, so the system cannot provide a reliable clearance decision.
required_actions: Provide organism.
Provide data type.
Specify whether the use is commercial.
Specify whether the use is clinical.
Specify whether cross-border processing or sharing occurs.
